_ignoreReasons.**/packages/sdk/src/platforms/react-nati: React Native intentionally carries an SDK override mirror of the core Lifi quote implementation so Rollup can swap the transport-specific module at bundle time.
_ignoreReasons.packages/lib/**/*.js: Generated WASM JavaScript wrappers (vs_wasm.js, vs_schnorr_wasm.js) are not handwritten code and inherently contain duplicated patterns.
